creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Kurt Jaeger from comment #2) Thanks for doing this Kurt, it looks good overall. It's probably worth mention something specifically about being responsible for overall design & content structure/organisation as well as whats already mentioned (service uptime), as we're more that way (content/audience) oriented than purely administrative. Also the canonical name is 'Wiki Admin' as in: -Wiki Team +Wiki Admin -

The FreeBSD Wiki Team +

The FreeBSD Wiki Admin team
